entities.name: Workout Tracker
entities.context: Python CLI tool for logging manual workouts and daily check-ins via argparse subcommands

entities.name: log-manual-workout
entities.context: Subcommand that accepts a JSON payload to log a manual workout to a SQLite database

entities.name: upsert-daily-checkin
entities.context: Subcommand for recording daily qualitative check-in with wanted/worked/regretted binary fields and optional notes

entities.name: Daily Check-in Framework
entities.context: Three-question qualitative self-assessment: wanted to work out (0/1), worked out (0/1), regretted not working out (0/1)

entities.name: argparse
entities.context: Python standard library module used for CLI argument parsing in the workout tracker

entities.name: SQLite
entities.context: Database backend implied by DB_PATH and get_connection() pattern for persistent workout storage

relationships.context: log-manual-workout is a subcommand of the workout tracker CLI
upsert-daily-checkin is a subcommand of the workout tracker CLI
CLI interface built with Python argparse subparsers
Workouts and check-ins persisted to a SQLite database via DB_PATH
Implements the wanted/worked/regretted qualitative tracking model
